productDisplayName: Fila Men Hitech White Sports Shoes
description: The Tech collection has been specifically designed to support the foot with an enduring Fit for people undergoing strenuous workout sessions. The heels have been fabricated with carbon rubber to deliver comfort, quick reflexes and durability. One might say that the Hi-Tech has been designed to guide the foot in a natural way from its first landing to take off.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and breathabilitySynthetic rubber casing from the forefoot to the lacing system for  structureCentral lacing system for customised, comfortable fitPadded tongue and  mesh collar for snug fitBrand name appliquéd in fibre outside the heel cupCarbon rubber outsole extended and embedded onto the toe boxMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticFull-length phylon midsole for lightweight durabilityOutsoleOutsole made of evergrind rubber with geometrical lugsScooped heel cup for cushioning with an impact guidance lineCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortshoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
